buggy_code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.pie(category_counts.values)
plt.show()
task: Show the distribution of sales across categories as a bar chart
clarification_query: Which chart type should be used to display the sales distribution across categories?
corrected_code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.bar(category_counts.index, category_counts.values)
plt.show()
explanation: A pie chart was used but the task specifies a bar chart. plt.pie should be replaced with plt.bar, passing both the category labels and their values.
